system.description:
Your special status with your patron deity is already noted in the writings of your faith and you are considered a living saint by many. You gain the following benefits:

  • Your Strength or Wisdom score increases by +1, to a maximum of 20

  • You gain an expertise die in the Religion skill or your existing expertise die increases by 1 step. Your maximum expertise die size for Religion is a d12.

  • When you cast a spell that heals a single creature, it recovers additional hit points equal to half your proficiency modifier.

  • You gain the @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-class-features.Item.h9wmhmum9efcfjjn]{Divine Intervention} option for the @UUID[Compendium.a5e.a5e-class-features.Item.2jlxytgjvgjnafvr]{Providence} feature or another option if you already have it. On each failed roll when using Divine Intervention, the number increases by 2 rather than 1.

  • Choose a cleric spell of up to 6th-level with at least one rare variant. You learn a rare variant of the selected spell for free. You only need to prepare the base version of the selected spell and can choose to cast either the rare or base variant as you see fit when casting it.

Once you have selected this feat, you can no longer gain levels in classes other than cleric.
system.prerequisite: Vicar feat, Hierophant feat, 12 levels in cleric, no levels in non-cleric classes at the time of feat acquisition
